name: larry
tagline: ClawHub (141★): Automate TikTok slideshow marketing for any app or product. Researches competitors, generates AI images, adds text overlays
verdict: No version or changelog anywhere, so you can't tell if guidance is stale. The description is a 744-character wall of text before you even reach the steps. And it never says what it's NOT for, which matters for a broad marketing-automation skill that can easily get invoked on the wrong task.

highlights.summary: Neither the description nor the body contains any 'NOT for' / 'out of scope' / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in the document; a broad marketing-automation skill like thi
A full ~65-line node-canvas implementation is pasted inline in SKILL.md alongside several complete JSON schema examples (config.json, competitor-research.json, hook-performance.jso
Description content is ~744 chars, a paragraph-length wall closing in an enumerated feature list, well past the ~500-char budget the check flags as fail even though the content its
